headline: Registration for Keynotes Now Open! Largest-ever COMPUTEX Forum with All-Access Pass; Early Bird Discount Countdown Starts
summary: COMPUTEX 2026, the world's leading exhibition for AI and startups, will be held from June 2 to 5 at the Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center (Halls 1 & 2) and Taipei World Trade Center (Hall 1). Today, the organizer TAITRA announced that the official registration for the highly anticipated COMPUTEX Keynotes is now live. This year's Keynote features an unprecedented lineup of industry titans, including leaders from Qualcomm, Marvell, Intel, MediaTek, NXP and Cisco who will take the stage to unveil th
